note: These 3 final recorded runs show 0 retries/rollbacks/replans because the underlying implementation work was correct by the time each run was finalized (real bugs found during iterative development - e.g. an mvnw path resolution issue and a missing JAVA_HOME - were fixed and DID trigger real, verified rollbacks in earlier attempts before this final clean run). Retry/rollback/safe-stop/approval/replan control-flow is independently and thoroughly exercised by orchestrator/tests/ (19 unit tests, including a real git-repo-backed rollback test and a bounded-replan test) - see docs/TESTING_AND_LIMITATIONS.md.
